data.body: Exemplar landed (commit 46d1abee). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 8 advisory). Advisory triage: (fa421, VALID/critical) _engine_support added to T201 allowlist — it carries print(json.dumps) stdout contract; without it CI would break. (fc67, VALID) added proving test tests/unit/test_error_handling_convention.py using ruff --stdin-filename to assert BLE001/T201 FIRE on a plan_review path and are SUPPRESSED on an allowlisted path. (f75a+f6d7, VALID) AC#2 'migrate stderr prints' is non-applicable: plan_review had ZERO print/sys.stderr sites (already logger-based) — recorded so AC#2 isn't vacuous. (fd746, VALID-minor) 41 (not 42) noqa:T201 sites, all under _engine/rebar_reconciler — allowlisted by directory so count doesn't affect scoping. (f125+fa80, discretionary) opportunistic narrowing is optional for the exemplar; demonstrated noqa+log forms instead, narrowing-with-test deferred to the core-leaves sweep (_json_or). (f21b, resolved) the logging-substrate prerequisite is 8fbd (closed). Discovered+fixed: ruff per-file-ignore globs match * across /, so a naive llm/*.py glob would wrongly exempt plan_review — enumerated llm top-level files explicitly instead (proven gated by the test). Code-review subagent: clean. make lint green; full suite 3204 passed/12 skipped.
